title: Data Structures Lab Vector
description: A deterministic operation sequence executed identically by the TypeScript and Python test suites against one data structure implementation.

name.description: Unique, human-readable identifier for this vector.

structure.description: Name of the structure adapter to instantiate (must match a registered adapter in both language runners).

notes.description: Free-text documentation, e.g. concurrency model or hashing scheme assumptions.

ops.description: The first op MUST be {"op":"construct","args":[...]} providing constructor arguments (empty array if none).

op.description: Method name to invoke on the instance, e.g. push, pop, get, set, contains.

args.description: Positional arguments passed to the method.

expect.description: Subset of the result fields to assert. Supported keys: size, value, list, contains.

error.description: If present, the op is expected to throw/raise an error whose code matches this value.
